goal: 整理 cxs 根目录结构，将源码测试迁移到 src 并对齐引用

summary.title: 迁移 cxs 源码到 src 目录并启用 Mainline 记录
summary.what: 初始化 Mainline 项目记录；将根目录平铺的 TypeScript 源码和测试整体迁移到 src/；同步 package scripts、tsconfig、eval 脚本、docs 与 skill references；清理 root 下旧 npm pack tgz 产物。
summary.why: 降低项目根目录噪音，把正式 npm/skill 发布项目从原型式平铺结构收敛为更清晰的 CLI 工程布局，同时保持 CLI 行为和发布包内容不变。
summary.user_goal: 按最佳实践整理 cxs 根目录结构，并使用 Mainline 规范记录过程。

decisions.chose: Only move source/tests to src/ and update references; defer db/query splitting.
decisions.rationale: Separates path-only structure cleanup from behavioral/module refactors so verification remains straightforward.
rejected: Move files and split large modules in one commit

decisions.chose: Keep src/db.ts and src/query.ts as the same import surfaces after the move.
decisions.rationale: Existing internal imports and eval tooling can be updated mechanically without changing CLI contracts or SQL behavior.
rejected: Introduce new facade modules and change imports broadly

decisions.chose: Update cxsd wrapper to execute src/cli.ts.
decisions.rationale: cxsd is the local checkout dogfood path, so it must follow the repository source entrypoint after the migration.
rejected: Leave cxsd pointing at removed root cli.ts

decisions.chose: Leave data, node_modules and dist in place; only remove stale root tgz pack artifacts.
decisions.rationale: Those directories are runtime/build/dependency state and moving them would change operational boundaries unrelated to root source cleanup.
rejected: Move or delete data/dist/node_modules in the same change

rejected.alternative: Move runtime state directories out of the repo in this pass
rejected.reason: Would change local index/cache behavior and exceed the structure-only scope.
Useful follow-up, but combining it with rename-only migration would increase review and regression risk.

risks: 大批量 rename 会影响历史 blame 和路径引用；已用 git mv 保留 rename 检测，并通过文档/skill grep 对齐主要引用。
外部脚本若硬编码旧的 /Users/envvar/work/repos/cxs/cli.ts 入口会失效；本机已知 cxsd wrapper 已同步。

anti_patterns.why: The development entrypoint moved to src/cli.ts; wrappers and docs must use the new path.

anti_patterns.what: Mix path migration with behavior changes in follow-up fixes
anti_patterns.why: This intent deliberately kept CLI behavior unchanged; behavior changes should be separate and verified independently.

followups: 单独评估并拆分 src/db.ts、src/query.ts 和 src/query.test.ts，保持 facade 后再渐进收敛大文件。
如决定发布本次结构整理，推送 mainline init 与结构整理 commit，并确认远端 CI。

architectural_claims: Project source root is now src/ instead of repository root.
CLI development entrypoint is src/cli.ts; npm package runtime remains dist/cli.js.
Docs and skill references should point to src/*.ts for repository internals.
behavioral_changes: No intended CLI behavior change; commands and JSON contracts are unchanged.
Local cxsd wrapper now executes src/cli.ts.
security_implications: No secrets or credentials added; changes are repository structure and Mainline metadata.
migration_notes: Update local or external development wrappers from cli.ts to src/cli.ts.
Root-level TypeScript source files are no longer expected.
